title: pyrus × sinkiangensis
intro: Pyrus × sinkiangensis is a hybrid of the pear tree, specifically a cross between the Chinese pear (Pyrus bretschneideri) and another species of pear tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus × sinkiangensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage certain types of infections. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
